scripts.desktop: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" --names "core,web,shell" "pnpm --filter core dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "npx wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4747/api/version && pnpm --filter shell dev"
scripts.stop: node -e "const f=require('fs'),p=require('path');const pid=f.existsSync(p.join('data','.server.pid'))&&f.readFileSync(p.join('data','.server.pid'),'utf8').trim();if(pid)try{process.kill(Number(pid))}catch(e){console.log('No running process found')}else console.log('No PID file found — use Ctrl+C')"
